examples: Don't miss the amazing Terracotta Army.
Have you ever been to the Terracotta Army in Xi'an?
The soldiers in Xi'an's terracotta museum are today light brown, but they weren't always.
Several terracotta brick buildings in Manchester, once a deep red, are now a rather nasty pink.
This time it is Port Bou, where the pink terracotta buildings have been replaced by gleaming white ones.
